scores.notes: The OCR output accurately extracted the 'company', 'date', and 'total' fields. The 'address' field had a minor character error (NO.2&4 instead of NO.2&4) and a missing space (JOHOR BAHRUJOHOR instead of JOHOR BAHRU JOHOR). The OCR output also included additional text not present in the ground truth, but this is expected for a full document OCR.
